revision.comment: new key for [[Category:19th century in religion]]: "*" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Refreshing]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q15129477)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{wikidata link|Q15129477}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:19th-century people by religion]] <!--categories--> [[Category:19th century in religion|*]] [[Category:19th-century people| Religion]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:People by religion and century| 19]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=19th-century_people_by_religion here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{wikidata link|Q15129477}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:19th-century people by religion]] <!--categories--> [[Category:19th century in religion|*]] [[Category:19th-century people| Religion]] [[Category:People by religion and century| 19]]
